name: check-entries
description: Deterministic journal-entry support testing guided by Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Compare sampled journal entries with supporting PDFs in Italian, English, French, or German.
interface.longDescription: Codex workflow for checking selected journal entries against supporting documents. Codex handles only non-inferable mapping ambiguity and review assumptions; deterministic scripts inspect journal files, inventory PDFs, match support files, compare amounts/dates/beneficiaries when available, and automatically export the natural full package: CSV/XLSX/JSON evidence, audit, diagnostics, review notes, and Codex review. Supports working locales it/en/fr/de and keeps all judgmental review in Codex rather than hidden API calls.
defaultPrompt: Use Check Entries on the journal and PDF folder I provide.
Infer language and mappings where possible, ask only for essential ambiguities, then run deterministic checks and prepare the complete natural review package.
Do not make direct OpenAI API calls from the plugin scripts; use Codex for review judgment and deterministic scripts for extraction/comparison.
